THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORD, REGINALD HERRERA, RAMONA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET #302 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUL-17-2002, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 7/17/02 9:00 A.M. AMENDED JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED IF THERE IS VIOLATION OF TERMS OF THIS STIPULATION. AMENDED JDGMT TO INCUDE $1,440.00 PAST DUE RENT AND DAMAGES OF $32.00 PER DAY FROM 5/1/02 TO 7/17/02, COST OF $191.00 AND NO ATTORRNEY FEES. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

COURT TRIAL ON JUN-17-2002 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGEMNT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION APPROVED AS TO FORM AND CONTENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANTS REGINALD FORD AND RAMONA HERRERA FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 106 6TH STREET #302 AND OTHER DETAILS AS SCANNED. JUDGE PERKER MEEKS; D. CARTER, CLERK; MAURA BALDOCCHI, CSR.
